title: sorbus verrucosa
intro: Sorbus verrucosa, also known as the warty rowan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sorbus verrucosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of this plant can be used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
